spanish: Para ellos un mes es una eternidad.
english: For them a month is an eternity.
explanation: Use of the preposition 'para' to indicate perspective/opinion, common in B1+ level

spanish: Es como si tú pasases 10 años sin tu pareja
english: It's as if you spent 10 years without your partner
explanation: Imperfect subjunctive (pasases) used in hypothetical comparisons with 'como si'

spanish: Los científicos se preguntaron qué pasaría si bloqueáramos la oxitocina
english: Scientists wondered what would happen if we blocked oxytocin
explanation: Conditional tense in indirect questions with imperfect subjunctive (bloqueáramos) in hypothetical if-clauses
